title: Atelier
description: A mod that adds a variety of customizable clothing and accessories
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/3b71f101b193494ec17332c02e75533ede2e3374.jpeg)

Atelier adds all kinds of clothing, armor, and accessories to the game. Some of them are purely aesthetic and can be used for role-playing, while others have useful purpose. What distinguishes it from other similar mods is its wide range of customization options. Almost all items from the mod can be dyed, and some of them can be further enhanced with additional modules. The mod is in the early development, so it doesn't add much yet
# Items
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/e41fb905e21c04c33081cc05cf284e4adc61484b.gif)
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/c00dd275c39e66cf4515e14e835fcefb48cc95ab.png)
# Getting started
To obtain most items from this mod in survival mode you will need to make a Sewing Table

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/81ccb9053fe1c8de37b2737d9bbcaabdc49a5271.png)

To craft an item, you must select a recipe from the recipe list and place the required items in the appropriate slots

![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/169e58e482eff848cd4f6cb16757b168e9eed07b.png)

# Obtaining fabric
Some items will require fabric, which is made out of cotton. To obtain cotton, you must either find Wild Cotton or, if you have Cotton Seeds, grow it like any other crop. Wild Cotton can be found in Savanna. If TerraBlender is installed, you have a chance of finding Cotton Field biome

![cotton field](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/84a811ca7cdac2257635f338b858b4f757f14a8c.png)

# Armor Plates
Armor plates can be eqquiped in corresponding slot that appears if armor vest is worn. If Warium is installed, they protect from Warium's firearms, and if not, then against arrows. Support for other mods that add firearms is coming in future updates. Any item can become armor plate if a special recipe is added via a datapack. You can refer to how existing plates are added by checking `data/atelier/recipes/plates` inside the mod. Chestplates from other mods or vanilla can become capable of storing armor plates by adding them to `atelier:plate_carriers` tag

# Gas Masks and Gas Filters
Gasmasks by themself don't affect player in any way. However, wearing a gasmask unlocks a slot for gas filter. Gas filters can protect player or any humanoid mob that is wearing it from certain harmful effect. There are 2 types of filters: basic and advanced. The only difference between them is how long they can be used before they become depleted.

In order for the filter to protect against some effect, it must first be prepared using the Milk Bucket

![filter preparation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/0a0ad4974776c1f6ce48bb0a6425e977ef721f1a.png)

After that, you need to treat the filter with the potion it is supposed to protect against

![filter brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/9f79a294259df5e0870809ea4edc807513e4a8ad.png)

# Patches

Some items of clothing unlock slots for patches when worn. These slots can be used to store banners, which are displayed as patches in specific locations on the clothing

![patch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pmwW7Q6W/images/51eeaa9b6f84a2070f78c96f86423eb2ecff60d5.jpeg)

# Detonator

Equipped pouches can become deadly weapon, but this comes at a price. If items included in `atelier:can_detonate` or `atelier:can_detonate_fire` tags are inside the pouches that are currently eqquiped on you, Detonator can be used to blow yourself up. Block destruction as a result of such an explosion can be disabled, and the power of the explosion can be limited in the server configuration

# Contact

You can get support, report bugs or make sugestions on [Github Issues](https://github.com/CrazyWoddMan/Atelier/issues) or [The Mapp-Union](https://discord.gg/eAqhEfN6tt) Discord server, where I will also share information about upcoming updates
